findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "run_tests" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Run saved test cases against a policy to confirm it blocks what it should block and allows what it should allow. Run this after make_rules and before using the …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
